title: You Can't Prompt the Room: The Last Skill AI Won't Replace - Balázs Horváth, VisualLabs
summary: Balázs Horváth argues that as AI handles code generation, the bottleneck shifts to human-centered work: stakeholder alignment, requirements elicitation, and value validation. He presents practical frameworks (story mapping, 4-question value framework, VAD thinking path) to bridge this gap, illustrated by VisualLabs' experience where only 4 of 21 hackathon agent ideas reached production.
writeup: Balázs Horváth of VisualLabs argues that as AI takes over code generation, the binding constraint moves to human-centered work: stakeholder alignment, requirements elicitation, and value validation. The talk offers three concrete tools for closing that gap: story mapping, a 4-question value framework, and a VAD thinking path. The case for prioritizing this work comes from VisualLabs' hackathon experience, where only 4 of 21 agent ideas reached production.
